early_quit.text: The list does not care how you feel. It only asks whether you returned.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: How long are you going to wait before you demand the best for yourself?
early_quit.author: Epictetus

early_quit.text: Weakness is not the task you miss once. It is the task you stop returning to.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: Never ask a question that gives an answer you can't live with.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: Frustration often appears when reality does not match the mental movie we wrote for the day.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: The body quits when the mind starts negotiating.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: Motivation is a visitor. Discipline pays the mortgage.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: The mission isn't over because motivation left the room.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: Future you does not receive credit for intentions.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: Discomfort asks the question. Conviction answers it.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: The standard tonight is not excellence. The standard is keeping the contract.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: Rest is earned by completion, not negotiation.
early_quit.author: Momentum

early_quit.text: It ain't about how hard you hit. It's about how hard you can get hit and keep moving forward.
early_quit.author: Rocky Balboa

early_quit.text: Rest at the end, not in the middle.
early_quit.author: Kobe Bryant

inspiration.text: You're not King Arthur or Lancelot. You're the one still clawing at the door to even see the damn Round Table.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: You're in what every book, movie, and myth calls the refusal of the call / dark night of the soul phase.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: The whisper you feel—'good enough'—is literally the boss of this chapter.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: Discipline is remembering what you want most when temptation offers what you want now.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: The days you feel least like moving are the days momentum matters most.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: Consistency compounds quietly until one day it looks like talent.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: Action creates motivation more often than motivation creates action.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
inspiration.author: Marcus Aurelius

inspiration.text: You are rarely one task away from success. You are often one excuse away from drift.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: You cannot become the person you imagine while protecting the habits of the person you were.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: You don't become disciplined by finishing one difficult day. You become disciplined when difficult days stop changing your standard.
inspiration.author: Momentum

inspiration.text: Today you happen to be the defeated. But what will you become tomorrow?
inspiration.author: Haikyuu!!

finished.text: You don't keep pushing because you like the grind. You push because you know who you were, you see who you could become, and you know the only path across that gap is fire.
finished.author: Momentum

finished.text: It's not about never feeling fear or fatigue. It's about never giving them enough time to vote.
finished.author: Momentum

finished.text: Another vote cast for the person you intend to become.
finished.author: Momentum

finished.text: The fight is rarely won by the strongest. Usually it is won by the one who remains.
finished.author: Momentum

finished.text: Everything after this point belongs to future you.
finished.author: Momentum

finished.text: The hardest part of the mission is often the five minutes before it begins.
finished.author: Momentum

finished.text: It gets easier. Every day it gets a little easier. But you gotta do it every day. That's the hard part.
finished.author: BoJack Horseman

finished.text: Not everyone who works hard succeeds... but everyone who succeeds worked hard.
finished.author: Hajime no Ippo
